metadata.title: Catching Enemies Off Guard with a Clean Double in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Took a quiet route to surprise the opponents and landed two quick kills. Timing and positioning made all the difference here.
What’s your favorite sneaky play in VALORANT?

#gaming #valorantclips #fps

Tell me your go-to agent for sneaky plays in the comments!
